mapper.select: SELECT * FROM friend_link WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY sort ASC, create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM friend_link WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY sort ASC, create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM friend_link ORDER BY sort ASC, create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO friend_link (name, avatar, description, url, category, sort, status, is_alive, last_check_time, card_style) VALUES (#{name}, #{avatar}, #{description}, #{url}, #{category}, #{sort}, #{status}, #{isAlive}, #{lastCheckTime}, #{cardStyle})
mapper.update: UPDATE friend_link SET name = #{name}, avatar = #{avatar}, description = #{description}, url = #{url}, category = #{category}, sort = #{sort}, status = #{status}, card_style = #{cardStyle}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE friend_link SET is_alive = #{isAlive}, last_check_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM friend_link WHERE status = 1
